Good. That's a 201-1000 size band in industrial components distribution. Now the practice areas.

Based on your role, here's what Oscar GC offers out of the box — grouped so you can see the coverage:

Commercial + Commercial Disputes — customers, vendors, suppliers, contract memory, and dispute profiles
Corporate + CoSec — entities, subsidiaries, corporate memory, board records, statutory filings
Employment + Employment Disputes — employees, contractors, HR memory, grievances, tribunal matters
Privacy — data subjects, processors, privacy memory
IP + IP Disputes — inventors, marks, IP portfolio, infringement claims
Regulatory + Regulatory Disputes — regulators, obligations, compliance, enforcement actions
Product — products, releases, product-agreement memory
AI Governance — models, datasets, risk artefacts

Looks close to your practice, or do you want to drop or add anything? So the sidebar reflects what you actually do.

Drop Corporate, CoSec, IP, IP Disputes, Employment Disputes, Regulatory Disputes, Product, and AI Governance. Add Channel & Reseller — distinct from generic Commercial, this is reseller-program work in a distribution business.
